examples.description: A clear example of real human speech. Model should be very confident.
A spoofing attack the model handles well (0.24% EER on this attack family).
A medium-difficulty attack. Note how the per-window scores show the model gaining confidence over time.
An attack family this model struggles with (15.54% EER). Honest demonstration that no detector is universal.
An 8-second clip showing how the model integrates predictions across multiple 4-second windows.

selection_criteria: Hand-picked from ASVspoof 2019 LA eval set to span easy detection, moderate detection, and known-difficult attack types. Selection is intentionally diverse to show realistic model behavior including failure cases.
